title: Tower T17190GRP Vortx XL Dual Stack Air Fryer with Digital Control Panel, Space Saving Design, 6 Preset Cooking Modes, Match Cook & Smart Finish Functions, 2460W, 11L, Graphite with Chrome Trim
features: COOK UP TO 4 FOOD TYPES AT ONCE: Includes a cooking rack which will let you stack multiple food types inside each basket for multi-layer cooking, allowing you to cook up to 4 different food types at once for convenience. Match Cook and Smart Finish take the guesswork out of cooking, aligning cooking in both baskets for a seamless experience

DUAL BASKET TECHNOLOGY: Two spacious vertically stacked 5.5L baskets combine for a huge 11L capacity for the ultimate in cooking versatility. Each basket is large enough to cook a whole chicken independently so you can easily create full meals for a family of 8 or cook more of your air fryer favourites

SPACE SAVING DESIGN: Slimline dual stack design provides a much larger cooking capacity than standard dual basket air fryers & other dual stacked air fryers on the market but takes up 35% less countertop space, fitting comfortably underneath cabinets & in kitchen cupboards *Compared with a standard Dual Basket Air Fryer*

INDEPENDENT CONTROLS: Easily adjust the timer, temperature and cooking settings for each basket via the digital control panel to streamline the cooking process. 6 preset cooking functions including Fries, Wings, Steak, Veg, Bake and even a DIY mode take the guesswork out of cooking
3 YEAR GUARANTEE: Trusted Tower quality with a standard 1 year guarantee & optional 2 year extension, subject to product registration online
description: From the manufacturer STACKED DUAL BASKET TECHNOLOGY The innovative dual stacked design provides the ultimate in cooking versatility with a reduced footprint without compromising on cooking convenience. Stacked technology provides all the benefits of a dual basket air fryer but takes up considerably less space on your worktop, so you can easily cook full family meals or larger portions of all your air fryer favourites with the spacious 11L cooking capacity. Previous page Smaller footprint than other 11L Air Fryers Taking up 35% less space, it’s perfect for smaller countertops or storing in tight kitchen cupboards No more juggling cooking times Smart Finish controls cooking times so different food types are ready together for simpler cooking Temperature setting made easy Press the Match Cook button to instantly set both baskets at the same temperature and cooking time Enjoy family favourites with Vortx Technology Rapid air circulation cooks food 30% faster with 99% less oil – you lose the fat, not the flavour Ultimate cooking versatility Cooking rack lets you stack multiple food types inside each basket for multi-layered cooking Next page 1 SPACE SAVING DESIGN 2 SMART FINISH 3 MATCH COOK 4 VORTX TECHNOLOGY 5 COOK 4 FOODS AT ONCE How much smaller is this compared to normal air fryers? This product is up to 35% narrower than a normal dual basket air fryer. Please bear in mind that it is slightly longer in depth and also taller. When comparing to a standard single basket air fryer, it will be larger overall. How is the temperature evenly maintained in both baskets? This model comes with two separate heating elements and fans to ensure even heat distribution and cooking. As with any air fryer, for best results do not overfill the baskets and make use of the cooking racks to space out your food.
